---
name: Chain support request
about: Request support for a chain not currently covered
title: "[CHAIN] "
labels: chain-support
assignees: ''
---

**Chain name**
Name of the blockchain.

**Chain ID**
EVM chain ID (if applicable). Example: 1 = Ethereum, 42161 = Arbitrum One.

**Is this chain indexed on Dune Analytics?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

**Dune namespace (if known)**
Example: `ethereum`, `arbitrum`, `base`, `optimism`, `polygon`

**What Dune tables are available for this chain?**
Example: `dex.trades`, `tokens.transfers`, `[namespace].transactions`

**Use case**
What kind of protocols or campaigns would benefit from attribution on this chain?

**Are you willing to contribute?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR with updated Dune SQL for this chain
- [ ] No, requesting for future inclusion
